info.title: Defacto2 API
info.description: A RESTful API for accessing historical Scene data and digital culture. Provides both HTML and plain text content formats for API consumers.

tags.name: milestones
tags.description: Operations related to historical milestones and significant events

tags.name: areacodes
tags.description: Operations related to North American Numbering Plan telephone area codes

tags.name: files
tags.description: Operations related to artifact files and categories

tags.name: platforms
tags.description: Operations related to artifact platforms (ANSI, Audio, DOS, Windows, Linux, Java, macOS, etc.)

get.description: Returns a complete list of all historical milestones with clean HTML and plain text content.
Returns all milestones that occurred in a specific year.

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: The year to filter milestones by

404.description: No milestones found for this year

get.description: Returns all milestones that occurred within a specified year range (inclusive).

200.description: Milestones in the specified year range

404.description: No milestones found for this year range

get.description: Returns only milestones that have been marked as highlights (significant events).
Returns all milestones that occurred during a specific decade (e.g., 1980s = 1980-1989).

parameters.name: decade
parameters.description: The decade in format like '1980s' or '1990s'

404.description: No milestones found for this decade

get.description: Returns a complete list of all North American Numbering Plan area codes with their associated territories and historical notes.
Returns details for a specific North American Numbering Plan area code.
Returns a complete list of all territories (states, provinces) with their associated area codes.
Returns details for a specific territory by its two-letter abbreviation.
Search for area codes by number or territories by name/abbreviation. Returns both matching area codes and territories.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query (area code number, territory name, or abbreviation)

200.description: Search results containing matching area codes and territories

get.description: Returns a complete list of all artifact categories with their descriptions and URL mappings for API, HTML3, and HTML views.
Returns a complete list of operating system platforms (ANSI, Audio, DOS, Windows, Linux, Java, macOS, etc.) with their descriptions and URL mappings for API, HTML3, and HTML views.
Returns a list of announcement files with nested URL structure including download, API, HTML preview, and thumbnail URLs.
Returns a list of files from the specified platform with nested URL structure. Supports any valid platform URI.

parameters.name: platform
parameters.description: Platform URI (e.g., ansi, audio, dos, etc.)

200.description: A list of files from the specified platform

404.description: Platform not found or no files available

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all releaser groups (collectives, individuals, brands) with their statistics and URLs. Each group includes total file count and total size information.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination (1000 items per page)

200.description: A paginated list of releaser groups

get.description: Returns a list of all scene magazines with their statistics and URLs. Each magazine includes total file count and total size information.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination (1000 items per page)

get.description: Returns a complete list of all BBS (Bulletin Board System) boards with their statistics and URLs. Each BBS includes total file count and total size information.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number (always 1, included for API consistency)

200.description: A complete list of all BBS boards

releasers.description: Array of all BBS board entries

totalPages.description: Total number of pages (always 1 for BBS)

get.description: Returns a complete list of all FTP (File Transfer Protocol) sites with their statistics and URLs. Each FTP site includes total file count and total size information.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number (always 1, included for API consistency)

200.description: A complete list of all FTP sites

releasers.description: Array of all FTP site entries

totalPages.description: Total number of pages (always 1 for FTP sites)

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all files in the database, including comprehensive metadata for each file. Files are ordered by ID for consistent pagination.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination (1000 files per page)

totalFiles.description: Total number of files in the database

get.summary: Get files from a specific releaser group or magazine
get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific releaser group or magazine including their files with comprehensive metadata, statistics, and URL mappings. The response includes both group/magazine metadata and an array of file records.
Returns a list of files from the specified category with nested URL structure. Supports any valid category URI.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Category URI (e.g., demo, scenerules, magazine, etc.)

200.description: A list of files from the specified category

404.description: Category not found or no files available

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all files in the database, ordered by ID (newest first). Includes comprehensive metadata, statistics, and URL mappings for each file.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of files per page (fixed at 1000)

200.description: A paginated list of all files

totalFiles.description: Total number of files in the database

get.description: Returns a paginated list of recently added files (new uploads), ordered by ID (newest first). This endpoint provides the same data as /api/files but with semantic meaning for new uploads.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of files per page (fixed at 1000)

200.description: A paginated list of new uploads

totalFiles.description: Total number of files in the database

totalSizeBytes.description: Total size of all files in bytes

Title.description: The title or name of the milestone
Title.example: Secrets of the Little Blue Box

Content.description: Plain text version of the content (all HTML tags removed)
Content.example: Ron Rosenbaum writes the first mainstream article on phone freaks...

ContentHTML.description: Main content with clean HTML (presentation attributes removed)
ContentHTML.example: Ron Rosenbaum writes the first mainstream article on phone freaks...

Link.description: URL to an article or external resource about the milestone

Highlight.description: Whether this milestone is marked as significant/highlighted

forward.description: Optional prefix text for the link

alt.example: Diagram showing how the blue box worked

code.description: Three-digit North American Numbering Plan area code

territories.description: List of territories (states, provinces) that use this area code

notes.description: Historical notes about the area code (splits, creation dates, etc.)
notes.example: New York City, but after December 1984 it split to 212 (Manhattan and the Bronx) and 718 (Brooklyn, Queens, and Staten Island).

name.description: Full name of the territory (state, province, or region)

areaCodes.description: List of area codes used in this territory

name.description: Category URI slug for API calls

description.example: public announcements by Scene groups and organizations

name.description: Platform URI slug for API calls

description.example: colored, text-based computer art form widely used on Bulletin Board Systems

FileURLs.description: Nested URL object for file access

id.description: Base64-encoded stable identifier for the group

totalFiles.description: Total number of files by this group

postedDate.description: Date when file was added to the archive

description.example: Time To Say Goodbye released by Audiofile in 2023.
